rationale: The citing paper references Dahl and Moreau (2002) only in the introductory literature list as an example of prior work that improves concept-generation techniques through mental analogies. The citation appears in a grouped set with other methods and is not revisited in theory development, hypotheses, measurement, study design, or result interpretation. The article's core contribution is a trait-based emergent nature scale and comparison against lead users and innovativeness, not an extension or application of the analogical-thinking framework.
